• Procedural mining world with depth‑based heat and ore tiers.
  • Responsive UI: mobile controls, HUD gauges, minimap, chat, shop, and admin panel.
  • Networking via MQTT for multiplayer, host election, and sync of map, players, and explosions.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

A 2‑D mining game generates terrain using a seeded RNG, lets players move, drill, build, and trade items. The interface adapts to desktop or mobile, showing HUD gauges, a minimap, and various modals for inventory, shop, warp, and settings. Multiplayer syncs player state, map updates, and explosions through MQTT, with host failover and admin controls.
